options.name: --tenant-name
options.description:
The name of the tenant to use for B2C mode. Examples:
contoso.onmicrosoft.com | login.contoso.com

options.name: --use-b2c
options.description:
Whether to use the AAD (false) or B2C (true)
mode

options.name: --client-id
options.description: The ID of the client

options.name: --client-secret
options.description: The secret to authenticate the client

options.name: --tenant-id
options.description:
The ID of the Tenant where the app is
registered

options.name: --access-as-user
options.description:
Adds the access_as_user scope. Requires the application
uri to be set.

options.name: --app-uri
options.description:
Sets the specified URI. [darkorange]Mutually exclusive
with --set-default-uri[/]

options.name: --disable-duplicate-check
options.description:
If enabled, disables a check for an existing application
with the same name

options.name: --set-default-uri
options.description:
Sets the default URI for the application. AAD mode will
use [bold royalblue1]api://{id}[/] while B2C mode will use [bold
royalblue1]https://{tenant}.onmicrosoft.com/{id}[/].

options.name: --sign-in-audience
options.description:
The valid audience for this client. Options: AzureADMyOrg
[[default]], AzureADMultipleOrgs, AzureADandPersonalMicrosoftAccount, and
PersonalMicrosoftAccount

options.name: --disable-duplicate-check
options.description:
If enabled, disables a check for an existing application
with the same name

options.name: --redirect-uris
options.description:
The redirect URIs that are valid for this
client

options.name: --sign-in-audience
options.description:
The valid audience for this client. Options: AzureADMyOrg
[[default]], AzureADMultipleOrgs, AzureADandPersonalMicrosoftAccount, and
PersonalMicrosoftAccount

options.name: --disable-duplicate-check
options.description:
If enabled, disables a check for an existing application
with the same name

options.name: --redirect-uris
options.description:
The redirect URIs that are valid for this
client

options.name: --sign-in-audience
options.description:
The valid audience for this client. Options: AzureADMyOrg
[[default]], AzureADMultipleOrgs, AzureADandPersonalMicrosoftAccount, and
PersonalMicrosoftAccount

options.name: --disable-duplicate-check
options.description:
If enabled, disables a check for an existing application
with the same name

options.name: --dots-as-dashes
options.description:
[[Optional:]] replaces dots in the application name with
dashes. This is useful when using the application name as the secret name in the
key vault.

options.name: --key-vault
options.description:
[[Optional:]] the URI of the key vault to store the
client secret in. The Service Principal is used for authenticating to the Key
Vault.

options.name: --secret-expiration-days
options.description:
The number in days after which the client secret expires.
Defaults to 180 days.

options.name: --secret-name
options.description:
[[Optional:]] the name of the secret in the key vault.
Defaults to the name of the application.

options.name: --sign-in-audience
options.description:
The valid audience for this client. Options: AzureADMyOrg
[[default]], AzureADMultipleOrgs, AzureADandPersonalMicrosoftAccount, and
PersonalMicrosoftAccount

options.name: --with-client-secret
options.description: Creates a client secret

options.name: --disable-duplicate-check
options.description:
If enabled, disables a check for an existing application
with the same name

options.name: --redirect-uris
options.description:
The redirect URIs that are valid for this
client

options.name: --sign-in-audience
options.description:
The valid audience for this client. Options: AzureADMyOrg
[[default]], AzureADMultipleOrgs, AzureADandPersonalMicrosoftAccount, and
PersonalMicrosoftAccount

arguments.name: app
arguments.description:
The Display Name or Client Id of the 
application

options.name: --api-app-id
options.description:
The Client Id or Display Name of the API to be
consumed

options.name: --scope-name
options.description: The name of the scope to be added.

arguments.name: app
arguments.description:
The Display Name or Client Id of the 
application

options.name: -y
options.description: Skip confirmation before deletion.

arguments.name: app
arguments.description:
The Display Name or Client Id of the 
application

options.name: --order-by
options.description:
The property to use to order apps by. Defaults to
displayName.

options.name: --take
options.description: The number of apps to take. Defaults to 50.
